effects.effect: You can add 1 [Ceratops] Vivosaur from your deck to your hand.

effects.name: Run Away
effects.effect: If your opponent would use an Attack Skill on this Vivosaur: you can rest this Vivosaur and discard 1 card from your hand; This Vivosaur takes no damage from that Attack Skill.

effects.name: Metamorphosis
effects.effect: Place this card into your FP Zone; Play 1 "Tricera" from your deck, rested.
